title: Token-opt: Go-generated repo-map artifact (hard 1-2K token budget) injected per phase — kills the 12x/cycle fresh repo re-exploration tax
summary: aider-style: symbol/exports map ranked by relevance to the cycle's top_n files, packed to a hard token budget, cached keyed by tree-SHA (paid once per change, not once per session); injected into phase prompts as the exploration starting point. Scoped-context literature: up to -82 percent tokens. GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (oss.md 3, papers.md 5.3/3.3).
acceptance: repo-map.md artifact generated at cycle start under budget (test pins budget)
cache keyed by tree-SHA (no regen on unchanged tree)
